parameters.query:
INSERT INTO resume_versions (user_id, original_resume_id, target_job_id, status, tailored_resume_data, change_log, validation_report, ats_score_before, ats_score_after)
VALUES ($1, $2, (SELECT job_id FROM jobs WHERE dedup_hash = $3 LIMIT 1), $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9);

options.queryParameters: ={{ $('Slice Top Jobs').item.json.ctx.user_id }}, {{ $('Slice Top Jobs').item.json.ctx.resume_id }}, {{ $json.job.dedup_hash }}, {{ $json.status }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.tailored_resume) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.change_log) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.validation_report) }}, {{ $json.ats_score_before }}, {{ $json.ats_score_after }}
